name: My Tea Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Add milk to egg to make 1/2 cup.
2. In a bowl, combine the biscuit mix, sugar, and margarine.
3. Add just enough liquid to make a soft dough.
4. Stir briskly until combined.
5. Turn out onto a floured surface.
6. Knead for 8-10 turns.
7. Roll out to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
8. Cut out with cutters.
9. Place the biscuits on an ungreased baking sheet.
- For soft side biscuits, place them close together.
- For crusty biscuits, place them apart.
10. Bake at 450°F for 8 to 10 minutes.
